potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall enable the user to switch between changing hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes by pressing a button.
The system shall support when the set alarm time matches the current time, the system shall trigger the alarm to ring.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: By pressing a button, the user can switch between changing the hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall enable the user to switch between changing the hour, minutes, alarm hour, and alarm minutes by pressing a single button.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to increase values while adjusting time settings.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of increasing values in the source text. The source text only mentions viewing and adjusting the time.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall support when the set alarm time matches the current time, the system shall trigger the alarm to ring.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states that 'When the set time matches the current time, the alarm starts ringing.' The phrasing in the rewritten requirement is not necessary.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow the user to view and adjust the time.
duplicates.requirement_b: A digital watch lets the user view and adjust the time.
duplicates.reason: These requirements are essentially the same, with slight wording differences.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow the user to stop the alarm by pressing a specific button.
ambiguities.reason: It is not clear from the source text if there is only one specific button for stopping the alarm or if it can be done in other ways.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
